header.title: Weight Loss Guide
header.subtitle: Your complete guide to sustainable weight loss

goldenRule.title: The Golden Rule
goldenRule.subtitle: Calorie Deficit vs. Nutrient Density
goldenRule.desc: Weight loss requires a calorie deficit, but the quality of those calories matters just as much as the quantity. Focus on nutrient-dense whole foods that keep you satisfied while creating the deficit needed for fat loss.

proteinFirst.title: Protein First
proteinFirst.subtitle: Why 1.2g–1.6g of protein per kg is non-negotiable for fat loss:
proteinFirst.muscle: Preserves muscle mass during calorie restriction
proteinFirst.thermic: Higher thermic effect (30% of protein calories burned during digestion)
proteinFirst.satiety: Increased satiety helps you feel full longer
proteinFirst.sugar: Stabilizes blood sugar and reduces cravings

plateMethod.title: The Plate Method
plateMethod.subtitle: A simple visual guide for balanced meals that promote fat loss:

veg.title: Vegetables
veg.desc: Non-starchy veggies for volume and nutrients

protein.title: Protein
protein.desc: Lean meats, fish, eggs, or plant-based sources

carbs.title: Fiber-Rich Carbs
carbs.desc: Whole grains, sweet potato, quinoa, legumes

today.title: Today's Habits
today.subtitle: Check off each habit as you complete it today

noSugar.label: No Sugary Drinks
noSugar.desc: Water, tea, or black coffee only

whyMatters.title: Why These Habits Matter
whyMatters.protein: Protein intake preserves muscle and increases satiety during weight loss
whyMatters.noSugar: Avoiding sugar drinks eliminates empty calories and reduces insulin spikes
whyMatters.walk: Post-meal walks improve insulin sensitivity and aid digestion
whyMatters.sleep: Quality sleep regulates hunger hormones and supports fat loss

modal.title: Set Your Goals
modal.subtitle: Let's personalize your weight loss journey
